title: Spelling & Word Study
objective: Students will explore spelling & word study concepts including Applying Spelling Rules to Complex Words.

lessons.title: Applying Spelling Rules to Complex Words

steps.content: Let's explore Applying Spelling Rules to Complex Words! Have you ever wondered about this?
Spell correctly and consistently, applying the spelling patterns and rules from KS1-2 to increasingly complex vocabulary encountered in KS3 reading and subject-specific study
Let me show you something cool. Spell subject-specific vocabulary correctly when encountered in new domains (e.g., 'parliament', 'photosynthesis', 'algorithm')
When you writes longer, more complex words in secondary school — like subject-specific vocabulary in science or history — do they spell them correctly without needing to check each time?

Amazing work! Let's review what we discovered about Applying Spelling Rules to Complex Words. Spell subject-specific vocabulary correctly when encountered in new domains (e.g., 'parliament', 'photosynthesis', 'algorithm') Apply known spelling rules and etymological patterns to unfamiliar words
